mentions.note: Nuclear and defense supplier, 80% Navy business; rallied $76→$213 on 30-year Navy ship building plan; commercial nuclear up 122% last quarter; trades 50x forward earnings — too rich, wait for pullback.

Dual defense (70% revenue) and commercial nuclear (30%, 95% YoY growth) exposure; only supplier of Navy nuclear reactors; 30-year shipbuilding plan locks backlog; Kinectrics acquisition driving growth; 3.3B NNSA uranium contract.
